message:
fix(scan): restore CircleCI extractor lost in bd sync

The bd sync commit accidentally reverted the CircleCI extractor changes.
This restores the complete implementation from commit 1a3b232.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -421,7 +421,7 @@
 {"id":"git_safety_guard-oien.2.3","title":"Explain-first UX nudge","description":"Add a short, non-intrusive hint pointing to `dcg explain` for blocked commands.","notes":"Scope:
- The block message includes a single-line hint: `Tip: dcg explain "<cmd>"`
- Ensure hint is after the top-line allow-once code but before verbose details.
- Hint must be safe to copy-paste with quoting.
- Add tests that the hint appears in both TTY and non-TTY outputs when a block occurs.

Acceptance criteria:
- Message remains concise.
- Explain mode remains optional and does not leak secrets.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-09T16:31:37.002374667-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T10:56:27.702712836-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-11T10:56:27.702712836-05:00","close_reason":"Added explain hint to both TTY and JSON outputs with proper escaping and unit tests","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"git_safety_guard-oien.2.3","depends_on_id":"git_safety_guard-oien.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-09T16:31:37.00358099-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"git_safety_guard-oien.2.3","depends_on_id":"git_safety_guard-ksk.1.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-09T16:41:40.670404378-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"git_safety_guard-oien.2.4","title":"Reduce heredoc trigger false positives","description":"Refine heredoc/inline trigger detection to avoid unnecessary Tier 2/3 scans.","notes":"Scope:
- Analyze current RegexSet triggers for overly broad matches (e.g., false triggers inside commit messages).
- Add safe-string gating to triggers where possible without introducing false negatives.
- Add targeted tests for known false-positive cases.
- Logging: include trigger id and suppression reason in verbose/e2e logs.

Acceptance criteria:
- Trigger recall remains 100% for true heredoc/inline code.
- Measurable reduction in accidental trigger rate in regression corpus.
- E2E regression harness confirms no unsafe allows.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-09T16:34:15.685521808-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T11:11:04.303925948-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-11T11:11:04.303925948-05:00","close_reason":"Completed: quote-aware heredoc operator trigger + corpus trigger logging","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"git_safety_guard-oien.2.4","depends_on_id":"git_safety_guard-oien.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-09T16:34:15.687101273-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"git_safety_guard-oien.2.4","depends_on_id":"git_safety_guard-ksk.1.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-09T16:41:45.71744283-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"git_safety_guard-p9e","title":"Implement Terraform extractor (provisioners)","description":"## Objective

Implement an extractor for Terraform files to detect executable provisioner contexts.

## File Pattern

- `*.tf`

## Extraction Targets

### Provisioner Blocks (executed)
- `local-exec` command
- `remote-exec` inline commands
- `null_resource` provisioners

### NOT Extracted (data only)
- Variable definitions
- Output values
- Resource attributes (non-provisioner)
- Comments

## Example

```hcl
resource "null_resource" "cleanup" {
  provisioner "local-exec" {
    command = "rm -rf /tmp/*"  # EXTRACT THIS
  }
}

variable "dangerous" {
  default = "rm -rf /"  # DO NOT extract
}
```

## Acceptance Criteria

- Correctly extracts provisioner commands with line numbers
- Handles HCL2 syntax (Terraform 0.12+)
- Ignores non-executable blocks
- Unit tests with representative fixtures","notes":"## Review Additions (2026-01-08)

### False positive controls
- Extract only from truly executed shell contexts (e.g., `local-exec`, `remote-exec`), not from:
  - documentation strings
  - variable defaults
- Negative fixtures must include data-only mentions of destructive commands.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-07T21:24:57.275380054-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-09T13:11:26.177891816-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-09T13:11:26.177891816-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented Terraform provisioner extractor with local-exec/remote-exec support, HCL2 parsing, heredoc handling. Added to scan flow. 6 tests pass. Committed in a6b640d.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"git_safety_guard-p9e","depends_on_id":"git_safety_guard-scan","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-07T21:25:20.549018763-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"git_safety_guard-p9e","depends_on_id":"git_safety_guard-scan.6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-07T21:46:12.516806682-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"git_safety_guard-pbte.1","title":"[Cross] Config toggles for highlighting + explanations","description":"# Task: Config toggles for highlighting + explanations

## Purpose
Allow users to enable/disable new UX output (highlighting, explanations)
without recompiling or forking.

## Requirements
- Config keys with defaults that preserve existing behavior
- Hook output respects toggles
- CLI output respects toggles

## Acceptance Criteria
- Config can independently toggle highlighting and explanations
- Default behavior remains safe and predictable
","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-16T00:22:30.122431485-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-16T01:56:03.035848434-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-16T01:56:03.035848434-05:00","close_reason":"OutputConfig struct implemented with highlight_enabled/explanations_enabled toggles (commit c3807d2)","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"git_safety_guard-pbte.1","depends_on_id":"git_safety_guard-pbte","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-16T00:22:30.123659578-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"}]}
 {"id":"git_safety_guard-pbte.2","title":"[Cross] Explain JSON schema update + version bump","description":"# Task: Explain JSON schema update + version bump

## Purpose
If new fields are added to explain output (highlight spans, explanations),
update the JSON schema version and documentation.

## Requirements
- Bump `EXPLAIN_JSON_SCHEMA_VERSION`
- Update JSON output struct docs and README
- Ensure backward compatibility notes are explicit

## Acceptance Criteria
- Schema version bump recorded in docs
- `dcg explain --format json` includes new fields with stable names
","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-16T00:22:35.641572783-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-16T02:40:55.367634381-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-16T02:40:55.367634381-05:00","close_reason":"Bumped explain JSON schema to v2 and documented new fields in README + trace docs","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"git_safety_guard-pbte.2","depends_on_id":"git_safety_guard-pbte","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-16T00:22:35.642790837-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"},{"issue_id":"git_safety_guard-pbte.2","depends_on_id":"git_safety_guard-zpw8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-16T00:23:06.025468152-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"},{"issue_id":"git_safety_guard-pbte.2","depends_on_id":"git_safety_guard-x0va","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-16T00:23:08.413703062-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"}]}
 {"id":"git_safety_guard-pbte.3","title":"[Cross] Performance budget checks for new steps","description":"# Task: Performance budget checks for new steps

## Purpose
Ensure new formatting and explanation logic does not regress hook performance.

## Requirements
- Identify new steps that should be timed (highlight formatting, explanation lookup)
- Add budget thresholds or confirm existing budgets are sufficient
- Add perf tests or benchmarks if needed

## Acceptance Criteria
- No measurable regression vs existing budget targets
- Budget expectations documented if new steps are added
","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-16T00:22:40.368216358-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-16T13:25:33.363773303-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-16T13:25:33.363773303-05:00","close_reason":"Performance budgets defined for HIGHLIGHT_FORMATTING, EXPLANATION_LOOKUP, OUTPUT_FORMATTING in perf.rs. Tests verify budgets fit within hook budget.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"git_safety_guard-pbte.3","depends_on_id":"git_safety_guard-pbte","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-16T00:22:40.369544128-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"},{"issue_id":"git_safety_guard-pbte.3","depends_on_id":"git_safety_guard-14lu","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-16T00:23:12.173041048-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"},{"issue_id":"git_safety_guard-pbte.3","depends_on_id":"git_safety_guard-zpw8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-16T00:23:15.210901019-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"}]}
